title: Python: sim API token not validated for minimum entropy
description:
In python/src/lichen/sim/auth.py and server.py, the --api-token option accepts any string:

    api_token = args.api_token or os.environ.get('LICHEN_SIM_API_TOKEN')
    if api_token == 'generate':
        api_token = generate_token()  # 24 bytes = 192 bits entropy

While generate_token() produces strong tokens, users can provide weak tokens like 'password123'. There's no validation of token strength when a user-provided token is used.

Location: python/src/lichen/sim/server.py:351-355, auth.py
Risk: Weak user-provided tokens may be vulnerable to brute-force.
Fix: Add minimum length check (e.g., 16 characters) for user-provided tokens, or warn if entropy is low.
